description: Eight evolved deep prompts attack the seven maximally disputed development cases independently, producing a reusable candidate bank and selector-development set.

strategies.name: Evolved Deep Generator Panel
strategies.description: A diverse single-case panel spanning state, congruence, phase, recurrence, interweaving, segmentation, and adversarial program synthesis.

stages.instruction: This case was escalated because a broad generator panel produced no repeated answer. Use the assigned reconstruction method deeply, but abandon it if it cannot replay every visible transition exactly.
